summary.key_theme: 受惠於強勁的 AI 晶片測試需求與納入 NASDAQ-100 指數，分析師紛紛上調目標價，推動股價創下歷史新高。

bullish.title: Susquehanna Maintains Positive on Teradyne, Raises Price Target to $550
bullish.reason: Susquehanna 分析師 Mehdi Hosseini 維持正面評級並大幅上調目標價至 $550，顯示市場對其 AI 相關業務成長潛力的高度信心。

bullish.title: Teradyne Soars as AI Demand Is Almost 70% of Total Sales
bullish.reason: AI 相關需求已佔總營收近 70%，證明公司成功轉型並在 AI 硬體供應鏈中佔據關鍵地位。

bullish.title: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Overweight on Teradyne, Raises Price Target to $550
bullish.reason: 分析師 C.J. Muse 給予加碼評級並調升目標價，與其他券商觀點一致，強化了市場對該股的看多共識。

bullish.title: Teradyne (TER) Joins The NASDAQ 100 And Recasts Its Growth Investor Base
bullish.reason: 被納入 NASDAQ-100 指數將吸引更多被動資金流入，並提升公司在成長型投資人中的能見度。

bullish.title: Teradyne Inc (NASDAQ:TER) Shines as a Top Growth Stock According to Navellier’s Eight Rules
bullish.reason: 具備 241% 的 EPS 成長率，符合頂級成長股篩選標準，基本面強勁。

bullish.title: Teradyne (TER) Hits All-Time High as Major Customer Reports Stellar Earnings
bullish.reason: 受惠於主要客戶財報表現優異，帶動測試設備需求預期，推升股價至歷史新高。

bullish.title: Teradyne Drives Robotics Growth With AI: A Sign for More Upside?
bullish.reason: AI 驅動的機器人業務成長快速，且擁有關鍵電商客戶，為長期營收增添動能。

bearish.title: Here's Why Teradyne (TER) Fell More Than Broader Market
bearish.reason: 股價單日下跌 7.44%，反映出在急漲後的獲利了結賣壓，屬於技術性修正。

neutral.title: Is Teradyne, Inc. (TER) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
neutral.reason: 僅為投資觀點彙整，未提供具體新財報或業務變動資訊，對股價影響有限。

neutral.title: Here's How Much You'd Have If You Invested $1000 in Teradyne a Decade Ago
neutral.reason: 回顧性歷史績效分析，對當前股價走勢無直接影響。
